title: Bridge Essay: Technologically-assisted communication attenuates inter-brain synchrony.
concept: Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

**Technologically-assisted communication attenuates inter-brain synchrony.** - Neuroimage (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2022.119677. PMID: 36244598. The transition to technologically-assisted communication has permeated all facets of human social life; yet, its impact on the social brain is still unknown and the effects may be particularly intense during periods of developmental transitions. Applying a two-brain perspective, the current preregistered study utilized hyperscanning EEG to measure brain-to-brain synchrony in 62 mother-child pairs at the transition to adolescence (child age; M = 12.26, range 10-14) during live face-to-face intera
